all.en: My best friend Anna moved to Canada two years ago for graduate school.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友安娜兩年前搬到加拿大讀研究所。

all.en: We try to schedule a video call every other Sunday morning.
all.zh: 我們盡量每隔一個週日早上安排一次視訊通話。

all.en: Today she appeared on my screen wearing a thick winter sweater.
all.zh: 今天她出現在螢幕上，身上穿著一件厚厚的冬季毛衣。

all.en: Behind her, I could see snow falling gently outside her window.
all.zh: 在她身後，我看見窗外輕輕飄落的雪花。

all.en: I showed her the new plant on my balcony and the lemon tree blooming.
all.zh: 我給她看我陽台上的新植物，還有正在開花的檸檬樹。

all.en: We laughed about how different our weather was at the same moment.
all.zh: 我們對於同一刻彼此天氣的差異笑個不停。

all.en: She told me about her thesis and her new part-time job at a bookstore.
all.zh: 她告訴我她的論文和在書店的新兼差工作。

all.en: I shared my upcoming promotion and the trip I was planning to Japan.
all.zh: 我則分享了即將到來的升職和正在規劃的日本旅行。

all.en: For one hour, distance and time zones seemed to disappear.
all.zh: 在那一小時裡，距離和時差彷彿都消失了。

all.en: Before we hung up, we promised to meet in person next summer.
all.zh: 掛斷前，我們約好明年夏天要見面。

all.en: Technology may not replace a real hug, but it certainly keeps us close.
all.zh: 科技或許無法取代真實的擁抱，但確實讓我們保持親近。

all.en: After the call ended, I stayed at my desk and smiled at the empty screen.
all.zh: 通話結束後，我留在書桌前，對著空白的螢幕微笑。

all.en: I opened our shared photo album and looked through pictures from our last trip.
all.zh: 我打開我們共享的相簿，翻看上次旅行的照片。

all.en: Anna sent a voice message later that night about a song she had just discovered.
all.zh: 安娜當晚稍後傳來語音訊息，分享她剛發現的一首歌。

all.en: I added the song to our shared playlist and replied with three of my own favorites.
all.zh: 我把那首歌加進我們的共享播放清單，並回覆三首我自己的最愛。

all.en: The next morning, she suggested we try a virtual movie night using a streaming app.
all.zh: 隔天早上，她提議我們透過串流 App 嘗試一場虛擬的電影之夜。

all.en: We chose a romantic comedy and synchronized our screens despite the time difference.
all.zh: 我們選了一部浪漫喜劇，並克服時差讓彼此的螢幕同步播放。

all.en: During the movie, our chat box was full of jokes and silly little reactions.
all.zh: 看電影時，我們的聊天框充滿了笑話和傻氣的小反應。

all.en: I felt that our friendship was somehow growing stronger with every shared moment.
all.zh: 我覺得我們的友誼隨著每一次共享的時刻，變得更加深厚。

all.en: By the end of the week, we had booked our flights for the summer reunion.
all.zh: 那週結束前，我們已經訂好了夏天重逢的機票。

all.en: Counting down the days made the distance feel a little shorter every morning.
all.zh: 倒數日子讓那段距離每天早上都感覺短一些。

all.en: Each morning, I crossed off another day on my calendar leading up to her arrival.
all.zh: 每天早上，我都在月曆上劃掉一天，倒數她抵達的日子。

all.en: Anna sent photos of her packing list and asked which Taiwanese snacks she should try first.
all.zh: 安娜傳來她的打包清單照片，問我她該先嘗試哪些台灣零食。

all.en: I prepared a small guidebook of hidden cafés, quiet bookstores, and night market favorites.
all.zh: 我為她準備了一本小指南，介紹隱藏的咖啡館、安靜的書店與夜市必吃。

all.en: On the day of her arrival, I waited at the airport holding a hand-drawn welcome sign.
all.zh: 她抵達當天，我在機場舉著手繪的歡迎牌等候。

all.en: When she walked through the gate, we hugged so tightly that strangers stopped to smile.
all.zh: 當她走出閘門時，我們緊緊相擁，連陌生人都停下來會心一笑。

all.en: We talked nonstop on the way home, picking up exactly where our calls had ended.
all.zh: 回家的路上，我們聊個不停，正好從上次通話結束的地方接續下去。

all.en: During her stay, she joined my family for a homemade hotpot dinner on a rainy night.
all.zh: 她待在台灣期間，在一個下雨的夜晚加入我們家自製火鍋的晚餐。

all.en: My mother adored her and quietly told me to keep this friendship for the rest of life.
all.zh: 我媽媽非常喜歡她，悄悄叮囑我要守護這段友誼一輩子。

all.en: When she returned to Canada, I felt sad but also deeply grateful for our reunion.
all.zh: 當她回到加拿大時，我感到難過，但也對這次重逢深深感激。

all.en: Our next video call felt warmer than ever because we now shared one more real memory.
all.zh: 我們的下次視訊通話比以往更加溫暖，因為我們又多了一段真實的回憶。

all.en: After Anna flew back to Toronto, we resumed our biweekly calls with new energy and joy.
all.zh: 安娜飛回多倫多後，我們以全新的活力與喜悅，重新展開兩週一次的通話。

all.en: She showed me her thesis defense slides and asked me to listen to her opening remarks.
all.zh: 她讓我看她的論文口試投影片，並請我聆聽她的開場白。

all.en: I gave her gentle feedback and reminded her to breathe slowly between important points.
all.zh: 我給了她溫柔的建議，並提醒她在重要重點之間放慢呼吸。

all.en: On the morning of her defense, I stayed awake to send her good-luck messages every hour.
all.zh: 她口試當天的早晨，我熬夜每小時傳一則祝她好運的訊息給她。

all.en: When she called afterward, her bright smile told me everything before she even spoke.
all.zh: 當她事後打來時，她燦爛的笑容在開口前就告訴了我一切。

all.en: She had passed with honors and was offered a research position in the same university.
all.zh: 她以優異成績通過口試，並獲得同一所大學的研究職位。

all.en: To celebrate, we planned a virtual party with friends from three different time zones.
all.zh: 為了慶祝，我們規劃了一場虛擬派對，邀請來自三個不同時區的朋友。

all.en: Each guest brought a small toast and a favorite memory of Anna from their college years.
all.zh: 每位賓客都帶來一段小小的祝詞，以及他們在大學時期對安娜最美好的回憶。

all.en: By the end of the call, my cheeks hurt from laughing at all the old college stories.
all.zh: 通話結束時，我因為大笑那些大學時代的舊故事，臉頰都笑痠了。

all.en: True friendship, I realized, simply waits patiently across every screen and every passing season.
all.zh: 我體會到，真正的友誼只是耐心地等候在每一個螢幕、每一個流轉的季節之間。

all.en: After Anna's research success, we began planning a joint trip across northern Japan next spring.
all.zh: 安娜研究成功之後，我們開始規劃明年春天一同前往日本北部的旅行。

all.en: She wanted to see cherry blossoms while I dreamed of quiet hot springs in the mountains.
all.zh: 她想看櫻花，而我則嚮往山中安靜的溫泉。

all.en: We built a shared document filled with maps, train schedules, and tiny family-run inn recommendations.
all.zh: 我們建立了一份共享文件，裡頭充滿地圖、火車時刻表，以及小型家族經營旅宿的推薦。

all.en: Anna learned basic Japanese phrases while I practiced reading simple station signs every quiet evening.
all.zh: 安娜學習日文基礎用語，而我則在每個寧靜的傍晚練習辨讀簡單的車站標示。

all.en: On our biweekly calls, we tested each other's pronunciation and laughed at our terrible accents.
all.zh: 在我們兩週一次的通話中，我們互相考驗發音，並對彼此糟糕的腔調大笑。

all.en: She mailed me a small travel journal with the first page already filled with her hopes.
all.zh: 她寄給我一本小小的旅行日誌，第一頁已經寫滿了她的期待。

all.en: I filled the second page with my own quiet wishes for our long-awaited northern adventure.
all.zh: 我在第二頁寫下自己對這趟期待已久的北方冒險所懷的安靜願望。

all.en: Her mother sent us each a hand-knitted scarf to keep us warm in the chilly mountain air.
all.zh: 她媽媽寄給我們每人一條手織圍巾，好讓我們在山間寒涼的空氣中保暖。

all.en: As departure approached, our calls grew longer, full of nervous excitement and quiet shared planning.
all.zh: 出發日子接近時，我們的通話變得更長，充滿緊張的興奮與安靜的共同規劃。

all.en: I realized our friendship had transformed every video call into a small bridge across two worlds.
all.zh: 我體會到，我們的友誼已把每一次視訊通話化為一座連結兩個世界的小小橋樑。

all.en: When spring arrived, we finally met at the small airport in Sapporo on a sunny morning.
all.zh: 春天到來時，我們終於在一個晴朗的早晨於札幌的小機場碰面了。

all.en: Anna ran toward me dragging two suitcases and waving the travel journal high in the air.
all.zh: 安娜拖著兩個行李箱朝我跑來，高高舉起那本旅行日誌向我揮舞。

all.en: Our first stop was a quiet park where cherry trees were just beginning to bloom.
all.zh: 我們的第一站是一座寧靜的公園，那裡的櫻花樹剛開始綻放。

all.en: We sat on a wooden bench and shared rice balls bought from a tiny station kiosk.
all.zh: 我們坐在木製長椅上，分享在小小車站攤位買的飯糰。

all.en: Anna practiced her Japanese with the shopkeeper, who smiled kindly and helped her finish each sentence.
all.zh: 安娜用日文和店家對話，店家親切地微笑，幫她把每一句話都說完。

all.en: That night, we soaked in a small mountain hot spring under a clear sky full of stars.
all.zh: 那晚，我們在山中的小溫泉裡泡湯，仰望布滿星星的晴朗夜空。

all.en: We whispered about old college dreams and the quiet ways our lives had finally settled together.
all.zh: 我們輕聲談論大學時代的舊夢，以及我們的人生如何安靜地走到了今天的安頓。

all.en: Each morning, we wrote one shared page in the journal, alternating sentences in English and Chinese.
all.zh: 每天早上，我們在日誌上共寫一頁，用英文和中文交替造句。

all.en: By the trip's end, that little book was almost full and felt heavier than any souvenir.
all.zh: 旅行結束時，那本小書幾乎寫滿，沉甸甸的重量勝過任何紀念品。

all.en: On the platform before her train, we hugged tightly and promised one more journey next year.
all.zh: 在她搭車離開前的月台上，我們緊緊相擁，約定明年再來一次旅行。

all.en: Back home, I framed our favorite trip photo and placed it beside my bedroom window.
all.zh: 回到家後，我把我們最喜愛的旅行照裱框，放在臥室窗邊。

all.en: Anna mailed me dried cherry petals she had carefully pressed between pages of her thesis.
all.zh: 安娜寄來她小心壓在論文書頁裡的乾燥櫻花花瓣。

all.en: Our next video call felt different, full of references only the two of us could understand.
all.zh: 我們下次的視訊通話感覺不同了，充滿只有我們兩人懂得的默契話題。

all.en: She started learning Mandarin tones and asked me to correct her gentle, careful daily greetings.
all.zh: 她開始學中文聲調，請我訂正她每天輕柔小心的日常問候。

all.en: I began studying French because she planned to attend a small conference in Montreal next autumn.
all.zh: 我開始學法文，因為她計畫秋天去蒙特婁參加一場小型會議。

all.en: We made a new tradition of reading the same novel and discussing one chapter every weekend.
all.zh: 我們建立了新的傳統，每週末讀同一本小說並討論其中一章。

all.en: Anna sent me a surprise birthday cake delivery from a local bakery near my quiet office.
all.zh: 安娜給我寄了一個驚喜生日蛋糕，從我安靜辦公室附近的一家烘焙坊送來。

all.en: I cried happy tears in front of my puzzled coworkers when the delivery boy arrived smiling.
all.zh: 當送貨員笑著抵達時，我在一臉困惑的同事面前流下了喜悅的眼淚。

all.en: That evening, we ate cake together over a video call, three thousand miles quietly apart.
all.zh: 那晚，我們透過視訊通話一同吃蛋糕，相隔三千英里卻彷彿同桌。

all.en: I realized that true friendship simply finds new ways to celebrate love through every changing season.
all.zh: 我體會到，真正的友誼總能在每個轉換的季節中，找到慶祝愛的新方式。

all.en: The next winter, Anna invited me to visit her quiet Toronto neighborhood during a heavy snowfall week.
all.zh: 隔年冬天，安娜邀我在一個大雪紛飛的週末造訪她寧靜的多倫多社區。

all.en: I packed thermal clothes, dried mango snacks, and a small bilingual journal she had once mailed me.
all.zh: 我打包了保暖衣物、芒果乾零食，以及她曾寄給我的一本小小雙語日誌。

all.en: She picked me up at the airport wearing her grandmother's hand-knitted scarf and quietly familiar smile.
all.zh: 她戴著她祖母手織的圍巾與一抹熟悉而安靜的微笑，到機場接我。

all.en: We spent mornings drinking coffee by the frozen lake, watching gentle skaters glide through soft daylight.
all.zh: 我們在結冰的湖邊度過清晨，喝著咖啡看溫柔的滑冰者在柔和日光中滑行。

all.en: Anna introduced me to her postdoctoral team, who welcomed me with bowls of warm homemade lentil soup.
all.zh: 安娜介紹我認識她的博士後團隊，他們以一碗碗溫熱的自製扁豆湯歡迎我。

all.en: One afternoon, we volunteered together at a small community center teaching cooking classes for newcomers.
all.zh: 某天下午，我們一起到一間小型社區中心擔任志工，為新移民教烹飪課程。

all.en: I taught beef noodle soup while Anna patiently translated every quiet question from the curious students.
all.zh: 我教大家煮牛肉麵，安娜則耐心地翻譯每位好奇學員所提出的安靜問題。

all.en: Before flying home, we wrote new pages together in our shared journal beside her bright window.
all.zh: 在飛回家之前，我們並肩坐在她明亮的窗邊，一起在共享的日誌上寫下新的篇章。

all.en: She slipped another quiet letter into my coat pocket, asking me to read it after takeoff.
all.zh: 她又悄悄把一封安靜的信塞進我的外套口袋，要我在起飛後才打開。

all.en: Above the clouds, I cried softly, grateful that our friendship continued to grow across every quiet ocean.
all.zh: 在雲層之上，我輕聲落淚，感謝我們的友誼持續跨越每一片寧靜的海洋而成長。
